ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "exp_time" REAL /* Experiment time in minutes */,
  "od_measured" REAL /* Measured oxygen demand */,
  "od_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for oxygen demand */,
  "od_zero_setpoint" REAL /* Zero setpoint for oxygen demand */,
  "thermostat_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for thermostat */,
  "heating_rate" REAL /* Rate of heating */,
  "internal_air_temp" REAL /* Internal air temperature */,
  "external_air_temp" REAL /* External air temperature */,
  "media_temp" REAL /* Media temperature */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_settings" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for pump settings */,
  "pump_1_rate" REAL /* Flow rate for pump 1 */,
  "pump_2_rate" REAL /* Flow rate for pump 2 */,
  "pump_3_rate" REAL /* Flow rate for pump 3 */,
  "pump_4_rate" REAL /* Flow rate for pump 4 */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "led_settings" (
  "led_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for LED settings */,
  "LED_395nm_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 395nm LED */,
  "LED_457nm_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 457nm LED */,
  "LED_500nm_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 500nm LED */,
  "LED_523nm_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 523nm LED */,
  "LED_595nm_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 595nm LED */,
  "LED_623nm_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 623nm LED */,
  "LED_6500K_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for 6500K LED */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("led_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stirring_settings" (
  "stirring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for stirring settings */,
  "stirring_rate" REAL /* Rate of stirring */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stirring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laser_settings" (
  "laser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for laser settings */,
  "laser_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for laser intensity */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_program_params" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for custom program settings */,
  "custom_prog_param1" REAL /* Parameter 1 for custom program */,
  "custom_prog_param2" REAL /* Parameter 2 for custom program */,
  "custom_prog_param3" REAL /* Parameter 3 for custom program */,
  "custom_prog_status" INTEGER /* Status of the custom program */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for metric records */,
  "zigzag_target" INTEGER /* Target for zigzag pattern control */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the biological cultures */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, oxygen) */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensors table */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuators" (
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator */,
  "actuator_type" TEXT /* Type of the actuator (e.g., pump, laser) */,
  "actuator_location" TEXT /* Location of the actuator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the actuators table */,
  "setting_value" REAL /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_time" TEXT /* Time the setting was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
